content.text:
Sorry for the confusion — when I said I’d opened the SalesByCategory view I meant I set the app context to that layout area but didn’t yet render the chart in your UI.

Would you like me to open (display) the SalesByCategory chart now? If so, tell me:
- Which year to view (2024 or 2025), and
- How many bottom categories to show (bottom 3 or bottom 5).

Or I can open the current vs previous year comparison (SalesByCategoryWithPrevYear) or drill into product-level details for the low-performing categories. Which option do you prefer?
